default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Understory and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Katya is taking over as primary managing editor; Kyle (VP of Growth) will be introduced next week](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Podcast summary article pipeline in development, estimated 4 weeks to production readiness](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Publishing cadence set: 5 articles/week, with plans to incorporate podcast summaries](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [SEO results typically take 3-6 months to show measurable impact](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Author profiles and content categorization strategies to be finalized next week](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition and Roles

  - [Katya becoming primary managing editor, working with Alex (VP of Growth)](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Sydney and Ada's roles shift to strategic setup and handoff](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Production team (Katya and others) will implement ongoing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Podcast Summary Articles

  - [Custom pipeline in development, estimated 4 weeks to production](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Plans to include:](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Timestamps for key topics](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [Links to Spotify and YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Embedding video on the page](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Icons for different platforms (pending engineering capability)](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Publishing strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Initially 3 editorial + 2 podcast summaries per week](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Aim to catch up, then shift to 4 editorial + 1 podcast summary](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Content Review and Publishing Process

  - [Team prefers faster publishing with focused review on tone/specific sections](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Katya to flag sections needing closer review](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [5 articles to be published weekly, shared the week prior for quick review](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### SEO Strategy and Timeline

  - [Pillar content approach: broad topics (e.g., "What is site retargeting?") linking to more specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [SEO results timeline:](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Fastest: 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Typical: 6 months for significant traffic improvements](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Monthly check-ins to assess progress and address issues](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

### Author Profiles and Content Categorization

  - [Need author profiles for Alex, Ali, and leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Alex and Ali to alternate on general topics](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Leadership team articles to focus on their specific expertise](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Categorization ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
      - [Service-specific topics (e.g., paid media, GTM engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [High-level industry trends and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Katya to present category options next week](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

### Branding and Keyword Strategy

  - [Shift from "outbound" to "go-to-market engineering" in content](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Balance between branded keywords and service-oriented keywords](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Aim to rank for "understory" among other companies using the term](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Katya to share initial podcast summary structure for review](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

  - [Update website to reflect "go-to-market engineering" instead of "outbound"](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Continue monitoring Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Katya to send meeting recap by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/JyAEwj4KDBEYWZnydA7CpVtxkUdDCLGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
